hooks.command: diff -q "${extensionPath}/package.json" "${HOME}/.cache/shipsmooth/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${HOME}/.cache/shipsmooth" && cp "${extensionPath}/package.json" "${HOME}/.cache/shipsmooth/" && npm install --prefix "${HOME}/.cache/shipsmooth" --silent && mkdir -p "${HOME}/.cache/shipsmooth/dist" && cp "${extensionPath}"/dist/*.js "${HOME}/.cache/shipsmooth/dist/" && echo "shipsmooth: deps installed") || rm -f "${HOME}/.cache/shipsmooth/package.json"
